textByHash.f1c967a599dba45de35d8813aa68261cfc10756e: Well, mate, to tell you the truth, I think I've come a gutser with these displays.
textByHash.afd246b054097f24f2d2eaf73a476217f99b338d: Gutser and no mistake. Me boss asked me to put together a quiz for the visitors.
textByHash.5e5ca356ea81aeb14cc2702acd500e9a2cf68699: But to be deadset with you, I wasn't paying much attention to me boss over there and I've done a bit of a rush job.
textByHash.d025360dd5c3162422e6521f74d64665ff66f8a0: Yep, that's the bloke. Say, mate, you do me a favour?
textByHash.8aaf4cb16cab9a44954a6192c26d1e258a2bf0ab: Well, you look like a pretty smart cobber. Could you take a look at the display plaques and give 'em a runthrough?
textByHash.203f326de7f89e364984a4b32963e59944b3d208: Bonza, mate! I reckon three questions per case should be bang to rights.
textByHash.9c1dc5bfa2aa97f9f83be830acf0e613b823a87a: Take a gander at each case and I'll look over your shoulder to give some advice.
textByHash.941c1290d2c37bb46cf9d54f499a54b626ed96c8: Fair dinkum mate. I'm sure I'll get someone else to help me.
textByHash.23361515bf7b107f858574092728f3894edb3d9b: G'day there, mate. How're the display cases coming along?
textByHash.201c47a4b2d134099583ef312d1fcc94d2ce1564: No worries, mate; just have a go when you can.
textByHash.3a587b53d21b3321f15232705cae124cfc9bb6be: Hmm, I don't think that's right, mate. Try again.
textByHash.65293ccca042fe6b518ca575da00e33d2f31200f: Nice job, mate. That looks about right.
textByHash.7cff82558f9239d4985c20b6b3b2cea22c57a398: Bonza, mate! I think that's all of them.
textByHash.370dd2f7bbf88a9cbb7ac19a8c564d0100add2e6: Well done, mate. You finished all of the displays.
textByHash.4f5ccecca55ff3fc7ea1156d1505db53ec672847: Come over and have a chat with me. I might have something for you.
textByHash.7af8d65c3d3676473da88b7432ef63d51db684c4: Bonza, mate. You're doing a great job so far.
textByHash.5bedf6a38ca33a442153a304a99282bc0e25588e: Beaut' mate! That's the best news I've had all day.
textByHash.4cd16bb4ccc9cc3975fb540f1c26b59d05c99148: Right, I'll have a chat to me boss over there and let him know you've helped me out.
textByHash.8c1c9235fa690c1a97a94540c8c75095701a8d5c: You know, with all this new information you've absorbed, I reckon you can say you're more experienced in Slaying and Hunting now.
textByHash.d8a8c147bee4eae8d7ac94ec067619a04ecf6e77: No worries, mate. You take care now.
textByHash.ddb9a6c6f792586a802efffe8bd6f69370142bdf: Thanks for all your help, mate. Hope you enjoy the museum!
